The '''''Pilum''''' was a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] in the service of the [[Ripoblus government]]. It served in the [[Sepan Civil War]] during the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It was destroyed by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle of Science Station Youst]].

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Pilum|pilum]] was a type of javelin used by the ancient Roman army.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
